programme.title: Blue World Ep705: Endangered Angel Sharks + IMAX Filmmakers
programme.desc: Blue World searches for endangered Angel Sharks in California’s Channel Islands, then teams up with world-renown IMAX filmmakers Howard and Michele Hall to film sea turtles feeding in the Philippines.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Lost In Java
programme.desc: A group of world-class professional big-wave surfers travel half-way around the world to attempt to surf a never before surfed 20 foot tube off the coast of Java in Indonesia. Former big-wave World Tour Champion Grant ‘Twiggy’ Baker from South Africa, Hawaiian’s Mark Healey and Billy Kemper along with Australian Ryan Hipwood and Tasmania’s Mikey Brennan, were locked in for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: This episode of Wildshots kicks off in South Carolina, where Tim Harmsen goes behind the scenes at Jacob Grey Firearms for an inside look at precision craftsmanship in action. Known for their stunning 2011 pistols—true works of art—Jacob Grey takes perfection to the micron. From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: T-minus one day to the mission, and the All-Stars are feeling the pressure. With a warm-up course of fire under their belts, the team levels up to some serious firepower—thanks to the experts at Capitol Armory. Just when they think the day can’t get any more intense, Don sends them sky-high for a one-of-a-kind shooting challenge aboard the Capitol Armory chopper. Once back on solid ground, the All-Stars dive into critical training scenarios designed to make or break their mission success. With time ticking down and expectations mounting, the team must dig deep, trust their instincts, and come together like never before.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: In the season finale of All Stars 3, the contestants’ hard work throughout the competition is put to the ultimate test. With tensions in the Middle East reaching a boiling point, the CIA assigns the All-Stars an executive protection mission for a key negotiator. However, before the team can deploy, escalating terrorist activity dramatically raises the threat level. Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. When they're caught on the X with no clear way out, there's only one option left—eliminate the threat. Who will survive the mission? And who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: In this episode of Country Ball you'll meet Kayleb Wagner who broke the Florida state high-school rushing record held by Alabama alumni Derrick Henry, now a Tennessee Titan, and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. Showered with media attention, like most all-time record breakers, Kayleb was now a de facto superstar and destined to be bombarded with scholarship offers. But only one came and was then withdrawn. Why? Because despite his athletic and academic prowess, Kayleb has one arm. Hear Kayleb’s story in his own words, and the words of his amazing mom Sam, where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and most importantly, where he’s going.

programme.desc: Your TV can be a window to a world of beauty, serenity, and well being. Our relaxing nature films and art displays can transform any environment into a natural oasis. Experiencing the beauty and wonder of nature helps reduce anxiety and stress, and increases positive emotions. Get your daily dose of awe & wonder with NatureStream.tv!

Back in Algiers, Sam, Erwan, and Dihya visit one of the country's leading digital agencies to discuss their journey and go for one last surf in some perfect longboard waves. Before leaving the country, Sam and Erwan talk with local surfers Dihya and Walid about the future of surfing in Algeria and how the emergence of the sport could impact the people there.

Engineered for excellence, this high-performance wave provides a canvas for the world's best surfers, set against the stunning backdrop of the Arabian Gulf.

programme.title: All In | Carissa And Lakey Face Their Final World Tour Battle In Perfect Honolua Bay
programme.desc: As Carissa Moore, Lakey Peterson, and the rest of the women of the WSL World Tour arrive to Honolua Bay, Maui, so too does one of the biggest swells in recent memory. For Carissa, who grew up in Hawaii, big waves come more naturally. For Lakey, a terrifying wipeout earlier in her career lingers in her mind as she sets out to clinch the world title in a surf-off with Stephanie Gilmore. Meanwhile, on the North Shore, Julian Wilson and Jordy Smith prepare for battle at the Banzai Pipeline.
